title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Momonosuke, Unknown person #2, Orochi, Unknown person #3 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They refuse to come out, no matter how hard I try!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: go with kin'emon and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am certain you will be able to revive the Kozuki clan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...After you leap 20 years into the future!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I have to go, you and Hyori should come with me, Mother!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the land of Samura!! When one suffers a great failure here, their life is usually forfeit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No man should question the resolve of a woman who speaks with such conviction!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well I'm not a man, I'm just a kid!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My LORD, with all due respect, with Lord Oden gone, you are no longer just his heir!! If I can speak freely...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I beg you to give us another chance to fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would rather die with honor on a battlefield...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: ...than wait here and burn to death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't you give us that chance?! I would do any- thing to wield my sword for you, my LORD!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I-I WILL BE ON MY WAY! NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would never be able to face mother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stop!! Stay away from the Capital!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
